privileged_info_summary: The task configures WooCommerce tax and shipping settings, then creates a manual order. All metadata values are verified: tax rate 8.25% for California (CA) with name 'CA Sales Tax'; shipping zone named 'California' with $7.99 flat-rate shipping; order containing 2x Organic Cotton T-Shirt (SKU: OCT-BLK-M) and 1x Bamboo Cutting Board Set (SKU: BCB-SET2); customer is jane.smith@example.com (Jane Smith); billing state is CA; order status is processing; order note is 'Priority fulfillment - customer loyalty reward'. All data is synthetic, created by the WooCommerce environment setup script.
